room.caption: [G6-EarthJ] Tiny want crystal. Leave crystal for Tiny, or Tiny crush puny Player! Ragh!
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(58) global.mapTeleport=0
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh15MainA)
var tempMplay; if global.bossTrack=0 {tempMplay=findMusic(605)} else if global.bossTrack=1 //Boss Fight: The Stone Golem { viewFix=instance_create(416,176,oMisc) viewFix.type=0 viewFix.sprite_index=sNull view_object[0]=viewFix tempMplay=findMusic(819) oPlayer1.x=352; oPlayer1.y=288 var boss,enemyBarrier; boss=instance_create(512,288,oPT_StoneGolem) boss.activateBoss=1 enemyBarrier=instance_create(176,224,oEnemyBarrier); enemyBarrier.image_yscale=4 enemyBarrier=instance_create(640,224,oEnemyBarrier); enemyBarrier.image_yscale=4 }
playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
